response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and has worked on various software projects, but lacks direct experience in industrial automation and cloud platform solutions.
strengths: Proven C++ development experience at National Instruments
Strong background in software development with diverse technologies
Experience with testing and secure development practices
concerns: No direct experience in industrial automation or cloud platform solutions
Lack of specific experience with IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity standards
Not directly familiar with Microsoft Azure cloud services
